0.text: Faintly circumscribed ground-glass opacity in the paravertebral mediobasal area in the superior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

1.text: Bronchiectatic changes in the lower lobe bronchi of both lungs

2.text: Traction bronchiectasis and fibrotic band formations more prominent in the lower lobe of the left lung

4.text: Largest pulmonary nodule measuring 5 mm in diameter in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung
